name_en: Black Gold Buckle Wax Leather·Double Chain
name_cn:
Black Gold Buckle Wax Leather·Double Chain
Loulou Puffer mini_ Mini Double Chain Bag is here! The whole bag is made of imported wax leather, paired with Y's diagonal quilted craftsmanship, featuring a soft front flap bag, with a detachable shoulder strap, can be used as a storage bag, or use the adjustable buckle as a crossbody bag, easily achieving multi-use!
Model: 759337~168520
Size: 23×15.5×8.5cm
